lines.text: #2 Area of Activity: has shifted from far west to general areas of
midwest, central south, and northwest. Indiana had 3 reports in 1
day within a 100 mile area, or 4 reports in 7 days. Texas had 6 very
important reports in 5 days, while the NY, N.J. and Pennsylvania area
had 6 reports in 2 months, formerly a very weak area for observations
#3 Types of saucers: The reports of saucer formations over Texas are
unusual in 2 ways -- almost all reports since 1947 have been nearly
all of single saucers seen. Also, the huge size of these saucerships
is almost unknown, the last aerial object known to be their size was
the Mantell report over Godman Field on Jan. 6 1948, and these huge
craft possibly hint a serious changeover in action. The 2 reports of
rocket-like ships over Denmark and Norway are similar to the Aug-Oct.
